docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
NONEVIM is my personal neovim configuration

It's Simple!

docs.title: Preview
docs.text: Take a look!

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Lightweight & Fast
  • Pre Installed Plugins (Essential, and Quality of life plugins)
  • LSP (Language Server Protocol Plugins)
  • Code highlighting (via treesitter-nvim)
  • Key Mappings for more efficient coding & writing
  • Error, and Warning Diagnositcs
  • Ability to fold code (via UFO)
  • A real-time markdown renderer (via render-markdown)
  • Rich UI (with neotree, lualine, catppuccin theme, and much more)

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: Want to install NONEVIM, here's how

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text: Before installing NONEVIM you need to have these things in order to install it

docs.title: System
docs.text: Program/Tool Purpose Git Cloning the repositery GCC Compiling native modules CURL Downloading extra resources (if needed) make Building plugin dependencies

docs.title: Runtime (In Neovim)
docs.text: Program/Tool Purpose ripgrep For live_grep and grep_sring for telescope fd Finder (for telescope)

docs.title: LSP
docs.text: LSP Purpose lua_ls LUA LSP pyright Python LSP clangd C/C++ LSP ts_ls JS/TS LSP html HTML LSP cssls CSS LSP emmet_ls Emmet Extension-like on VSCode imported to Neovim

docs.title: Formatter
docs.text: Formatter Purpose stylua Lua Formatter pretter JS/TS, HTML, CSS Formatter clang-format C/C++ Formatter autopep8 Python Formatter

docs.title: Backup your exisiting configuration
docs.text: If you have an exisiting configuration, it's recommended to create a copy of it or move it to a safe place

docs.title: Linux/MacOS
docs.text: mv ~/.config/nvim/ ~/.config/nvim-backup

docs.title: Windows (Powershell)
docs.text: Move-Item $env:LOCALAPPDATA\nvim $env:LOCALAPPDATA\nvim_backup

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
Now, after you installed all the requirements and backed up your exisiting configuration, let's install NONEVIM

# Clone the repositery
git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/nothingfr87/NONEVIM.git ~/.config/nvim

docs.title: Linux/MacOS
docs.text:
# Remove unecessary files
cd ~/.config/nvim
rm -rf .git/ README.md screenshot* docs/

docs.title: Windows (Powershell)
docs.text: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/nothingfr87/NONEVIM.git $env:LOCALAPPDATA\nvim

docs.title: Installing Plugins
docs.text:
After we had installed NONEVIM, now enter Neovim to let the plugin manager Lazy download all the plugins

nvim

docs.title: Keymaps
docs.text: This document contains all keybindings available in NONEVIM.

docs.title: Sidebar Management
docs.text: Keymap Action Ctrl + b Toggle NeoTree Space + e Focus NeoTree

docs.title: Fuzzy Finder (Telescope)
docs.text:
Important

The Telescope plugin requires fd to be installed on your system

docs.title: File Search
docs.text: Keymap Action Ctrl + f Find Files Ctrl + g Live Grep / Search Text

docs.title: Terminal Management
docs.text: Keymap Action Ctrl + t Toggle Terminal

docs.title: Terminal Mode
docs.text: Keymap Action Esc Exit Terminal Mode

docs.title: Toggling
docs.text: Keymap Action Space + m + d Toggle Render Markdown

docs.title: Toggling
docs.text: Keymap Action Space + r Toggle Live Server

docs.title: Execution
docs.text: Keymap Action Ctrl + r Run Current File

docs.title: Fold Management
docs.text: Keymap Action z + Shift + r Open All Folds z + Shift + m Close All Folds

docs.title: Buffer Navigation
docs.text: Keymap Action Tab Next Buffer Shift + Tab Previous Buffer

docs.title: Buffer Selection
docs.text: Keymap Action Space + p Pick Buffer

docs.title: Buffer Closing
docs.text: Keymap Action Space + w Pick Buffer To Close

docs.title: Git Visualization
docs.text: Keymap Action Space + g + w Toggle Git Diff Highlighting Space + g + d Toggle Deleted Lines Space + g + b Toggle Current Line Blame

docs.title: Window Splitting
docs.text: Keymap Action Space + t + h Split Window Horizontally Space + t + v Split Window Vertically

docs.title: Window Closing
docs.text: Keymap Action Ctrl + q Force Close Current Window

docs.title: Window Navigation (Built-in)
docs.text: Keymap Action Space + h Move To Left Window Space + j Move To Lower Window Space + k Move To Upper Window Space + l Move To Right Window

docs.title: Window Resizing (Built-in)
docs.text: Keymap Action Space + > Increase Width Space + < Decrease Width Space + + Increase Height Space + - Decrease Height

docs.title: Code Intelligence
docs.text: Keymap Action Space + h Toggle Inlay Hints Space + f Format Current File

docs.title: Manual Folding
docs.text: Keymap Action z + f Create Fold Selection

docs.title: File Navigation
docs.text: Keymap Action gg Go To Top Of File Shift + g Go To Bottom

docs.title: Scrolling
docs.text: Keymap Action Ctrl + d Scroll Half Page Down Ctrl + u Scroll Half Page Up Ctrl + f Scroll Full Page Down Ctrl + b Scroll Full Page Up

docs.title: Searching
docs.text: Keymap Action / Search Forward ? Search Backward n Next Match Shift + n Previous Match

docs.title: Undo & Redo
docs.text: Keymap Action u Undo Ctrl + r Redo

docs.title: Copy & Paste
docs.text: Keymap Action yy Copy Line dd Delete Line p Paste After Cursor Shift + p Paste Before Cursor

docs.title: Plugins
docs.text: This page documents every plugin included in NONEVIM and explains its role within the distribution.

docs.title: Language Server Protocol (LSP)
docs.text:
These plugins provide IDE-like features such as diagnostics, code navigation, hover documentation, code actions, and intelligent code completion.

Plugin Purpose nvim-lspconfig Configure and manage Language Servers nvim-cmp Completion Engine for LSP, snippets, and buffer sources

docs.title: Syntax Parsing & Highlighting
docs.text:
These plugins improve syntax awareness and provide more accurate highlighting than traditional regex-based syntax highlighting.

Plugin Purpose nvim-treesitter Modern Syntax Parsing and Highlighting

docs.title: Code Formatting
docs.text:
These plugins ensure code follows consistent formatting rules.

Plugin Purpose conform.nvim Format Files Using External Formatters

docs.title: Colorscheme
docs.text:
These plugins control the overall visual appearance of NONEVIM.

Plugin Purpose catppuccin Main Colorscheme for NONEVIM

docs.title: Statusline
docs.text:
Displays editor information such as mode, file name, Git branch, diagnostics, and cursor position.

Plugin Purpose lualine.nvim Modern Statusline

docs.title: Buffer & Tab Management
docs.text:
These plugins improve navigation between open files.

Plugin Purpose bufferline.nvim Display Open Buffers as Tabs

docs.title: File Explorer
docs.text:
These plugins provide a graphical file tree for navigating projects.

Plugin Purpose neo-tree.nvim Modern File Explorer

docs.title: Icons
docs.text:
These plugins provide icons used by other UI plugins.

Plugin Purpose nvim-web-devicons File Type Icons

docs.title: Indentation Visualization
docs.text:
These plugins help visualize code structure.

Plugin Purpose mini.indentscope Animated Indentation Guides

docs.title: Comment Enhancement
docs.text:
Improve readability of TODOs, warnings, notes, and other comments.

Plugin Purpose better-comments.nvim Highlight and Stylize Comments

docs.title: Markdown Experience
docs.text:
These plugins improve writing and reading Markdown documents.

Plugin Purpose render-markdown.nvim Real-Time Markdown Rendering

docs.title: Color Visualization
docs.text:
These plugins display colors directly inside code.

Plugin Purpose nvim-highlight-colors Preview HEX, RGB, RGBA, HSL, and Named Colors

docs.title: Fuzzy Finding
docs.text:
Fast searching for files, text, buffers, and symbols.

Plugin Purpose telescope.nvim Fuzzy Finder and Search Tool

docs.title: Keybinding Discovery
docs.text:
Provides interactive keybinding hints.

Plugin Purpose which-key.nvim Display Available Keybindings

docs.title: Embedded Terminal
docs.text:
Allows terminal sessions to run inside Neovim.

Plugin Purpose toggleterm.nvim Integrated Floating Terminal

docs.title: Git Decorations
docs.text:
Display Git information directly inside the editor.

Plugin Purpose gitsigns.nvim Show Git Changes, Deleted Lines, and Blame Information

docs.title: Running Programs
docs.text:
Execute source files without leaving Neovim.

Plugin Purpose code_runner.nvim Run Programs and Scripts

docs.title: Development Servers
docs.text:
Utilities specifically useful for frontend development.

Plugin Purpose live-server.nvim Launch Local Development Server with Live Reload

docs.title: Folding Enhancements
docs.text:
Modernize Neovim's folding system.

Plugin Purpose nvim-ufo Enhanced Fold Rendering and Management

docs.title: Dependency Libraries
docs.text: These plugins are not directly interacted with by the user but are required by other plugins.

docs.title: Core Dependencies
docs.text: Plugin Purpose plenary.nvim Utility Functions Used by Many Plugins nui.nvim UI Components for Modern Neovim Plugins

docs.title: Plugin Statistics
docs.text: Category Count Development 4 User Interface 8 Navigation & Search 2 Terminal Integration 1 Version Control 1 Code Execution 1 Web Development 1 Code Folding 1 Dependencies 2 Total Plugins 21

docs.title: Plugin Philosophy
docs.text:
NONEVIM aims to provide:

  • Modern IDE-like development features
  • Fast navigation and searching
  • Clean and minimal user interface
  • Git integration
  • Built-in terminal workflows
  • Enhanced code folding
  • Web development utilities
  • Sensible defaults with minimal configuration required

This plugin selection is designed to keep NONEVIM lightweight while still providing the features expected from a modern development environment.
